summary: Tested Billing & Reconciliation module after data cleanup. All 20 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI shows all 4 summary cards, New Reconciliation dialog with date range selection, and Debit/Credit Notes section. Module is working correctly with 0 data (as expected after cleanup).
seed_data_creation: None - tested with empty data state after cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Billing & Reconciliation module is fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_billing_reconciliation.py cover all endpoints. The distributor 99fb55dc-532c-4e85-b618-6b8a5e552c04 (Test) has 0 shipments, 0 deliveries, 0 reconciliations, 0 debit/credit notes. To test full reconciliation flow: 1) Create a shipment via Shipments tab, 2) Create a delivery with 'delivered' status, 3) Then test reconciliation calculation and creation.
